input: Hi, I was charged $79 on March 1st for a plan I downgraded from in February. I have the confirmation email. This is the third billing issue in 6 months. Please fix this and explain what is happening.
response: Hi, sorry about the billing issue! We've confirmed the wrong charge and are refunding $79 to your account — should arrive in 5–7 days. We'll also look into why this keeps happening. Thanks for your patience!
